---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, repo structure, or publishing template
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

What do you want to improve?

## Motivation

Why would this make the skill or repo better?

## Proposed change

Describe the change as concretely as possible.

## Scope

- [ ] README / docs
- [ ] SKILL behavior
- [ ] examples
- [ ] references
- [ ] publishing template
- [ ] repo structure

## Additional notes

Anything else we should know?
